title: ‘Acknowledging the obvious’: Russia reacts to US waiver on oil amid Iran war
summary_full: Russia asserted that global energy markets cannot be stable without its oil, following a US temporary allowance for Russian crude sales already in transit. This move occurred as oil prices surged amid escalating conflict involving Iran, Israel, and the US, with Iran warning of retaliatory attacks on regional energy infrastructure.
